holdings.n: Fidelity Securities Lending Cash Central Fund

holdings.infoBox: FDFF is an equity ETF with a total of 51 individual holdings. The top holdings are BlackRock stock at 5.99%, DBS Group Holdings at 5.86%, Capital One Financial at 5.63%, Bankinter at 4.92%, and FinecoBank Banca Fineco at 4.77%.

overview.description: The Fidelity Disruptive Finance ETF (FDFF) is an exchange-traded fund that mostly invests in stocks based on a particular theme. The fund is an actively managed fund that invests in disruptive finance companies. These are organizations in the finance industry that are pushing for innovative developments that may significantly alter the way they deliver their products and services FDFF was launched on Apr 16, 2020 and is issued by Fidelity.

data.title: Why traditional active managers are joining the ETF space
data.text: Greg Friedman, head of ETF management and strategy at Fidelity Investments, joins 'Halftime Report' to discuss a spike in ETF flows going to active management, Fidelity's decision to convert mutual fu...
